_notes.coordinate_system: Tiles are [row, col] in the enemy field. Row 0=front(5 cols), Row 1=mid(5 cols), Row 2=back(3 cols).

targeting_types.tile: Player/AI chooses a specific [row,col]. 'hits' are offsets [dRow,dCol] from that tile.
targeting_types.column: Player/AI chooses column index (0-4). 'hits' are [rowIndex, 0] pairs; col is substituted at runtime.
targeting_types.row: Player/AI chooses row index (0-2). 'hits' covers all valid columns in that row.
targeting_types.absolute: No targeting choice — fixed tile positions listed directly.

_notes.sources: Derived from GIF animations in assets/gifs/.

air_torpedo_strike.name: Unguided Torpedo
air_torpedo_strike._source: GIF: cross/diamond — center 275, 4 orthogonal neighbors 69 each

air_bomb_drop_rnd.name: Shrapnel Bomb
air_bomb_drop_rnd._source: One-tile damage; 75% hit chance on primary tile, 6% probabilistic hit on 4 orthogonal neighbours (no diagonals)

goliath_quad_cannon.name: Total Annihilation
goliath_quad_cannon._source: GIF: 2×2 block — 4 tiles all deal 251 damage

phalanx_gatling_gun.name: Incendiary Burst Rounds (Horizontal)
phalanx_gatling_gun._source: GIF: full horizontal row — all 5 columns deal 204 damage each

phalanx_gatling_gun_row.name: Incendiary Burst Rounds (Vertical)
phalanx_gatling_gun_row._source: GIF: column — front 231, mid 272 (primary), back estimated lower

goliath_mlrs_left.name: Explosive Shell (MLRS Left)
goliath_mlrs_left._source: 3×3 area centered on target tile — all 9 tiles equal damage

goliath_mlrs_right.name: Explosive Shell (MLRS Right)
goliath_mlrs_right._source: GIF: checkerboard pattern (row+col even) — 7 tiles, damage 128–173
